summary.authoritative_rule: a future boundary-extension frontier may be prepared, but not opened, while the current derivation boundary remains frozen by default

triage_rows.rationale: future boundary extension now has an explicit prelaunch checklist and does not need speculative signal work
the lockout-aligned derivation boundary remains the authoritative default until an explicit policy shift occurs
existing raw coverage is insufficient reason to extend the boundary without an explicit shadow-only opening

interpretation: V1.34HG converts the boundary-extension checklist into a simple governance verdict: the checklist is ready, but the current boundary remains frozen.
The point is to make a future explicit extension clean without letting preparation mutate into automatic extension.
